description:
Fast, modern desktop translation application

A fast, modern desktop translation application built with Rust and Tauri that provides instant translation between multiple languages with global hotkey support, system tray integration, and a beautiful user interface. Supports OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, and Ollama for both cloud and local AI-powered translations.
🐛 Bug Fixes:
• Fixed newline formatting issue with Ollama translations when typing in the "Original Text" field
• Improved Ollama response parsing to properly handle escaped newlines
• Enhanced text formatting consistency across all translation providers

🔧 Technical Improvements:
• Updated Ollama prompt instructions to preserve line breaks and formatting
• Added defensive programming for various newline escape formats (\n, /n, \r\n, \r)
• Improved translation response processing for better text formatting

This is a minor bugfix release that resolves the issue where Ollama would return literal "/n" instead of actual newlines when translating multi-paragraph text entered manually in the input field.
